scripts.deploy: npm run preprocess && npm run bump-sw-version && firebase deploy
scripts.build:food-db: cat public/js/food/food-emoji.js public/js/food/food-macros.js public/js/food/fdc-db.js public/js/food/recipe-store.js public/js/food/fdc-search.js public/js/food/food-log-migrate.js > public/js/food/database-utils.js
